parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message: 'AVA webhook opérationnel', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const b = $input.first().json;
const lines = b.lines || [];
let dominant_tva = 0.20;
if (lines.length > 0) dominant_tva = (lines[0].tva_rate || 20) / 100;
return [{ json: {
  vendor:         b.tiers || '',
  invoice_number: b.invoice_number || '',
  date:           b.date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  amount_ht:      b.montant_ht || 0,
  vat_rate:       dominant_tva,
  amount_tva:     b.montant_tva || 0,
  amount_ttc:     b.montant_ttc || 0,
  currency:       'MAD',
  category:       b.type === 'vente' ? 'ventes_produits' : 'achats_marchandises',
  type:           b.type || 'achat',
  ice:            b.ice || null,
  societe:        b.societe || '',
  cabinet:        b.cabinet || '',
  lines:          lines,
  confidence:     1.0,
  _source:        'manual',
  _needs_review:  false,
  submitted_at:   b.submitted_at || new Date().toISOString(),
} }];

={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, status: 'needs_review', invoice_number: $json.invoice_number, confidence: $json.confidence, message: 'Facture en attente de révision manuelle', executionId: $execution.id }) }}
